-- 1 of 5 --

Your Open Cart Sequence
▪ 	Leave your cart open for 3 to 7 days
▪ 	Favorite opening days are Tuesday through Thursday (Friday also
works)
▪ 	Avoid the weekends
▪ 	Favorite closing days - avoid the weekends
Module 6: Open Cart Considerations
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

Your Open Cart Sequence
▪ 	Days of the week I’ve used:
▪ 	Open Monday, close Friday (5 days)
▪ 	Open Tuesday, close Thursday (3 days)
▪ 	Open Wednesday, close Friday (3 days)
▪ 	Open Tuesday, close Monday (7 days)
▪ 	Open Thursday, close Monday (5 days)
▪ 	Open Thursday, close Wednesday (7 days)
Module 6: Open Cart Considerations
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

When to Send Emails
▪ 	Cart open day: send two emails
▪ 	“We’re open”
▪ 	Tsunami email
▪ 	Send an email EVERY DAY during your launch
▪ 	The day before you close cart, start messaging scarcity
Module 6: Open Cart Considerations
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 5 --

When to Send Emails
▪ 	Cart closing day: send TWO or THREE emails
▪ 	6am - we’re closing tonight
▪ 	12pm - we’re closing in 12 hours
▪ 	6pm - last chance
Module 6: Open Cart Considerations
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
